nasb.text: But with an overflowing flood He will make a complete end of its site, And will pursue His enemies into darkness.

esv.text: But with an overflowing flood he will make a complete end of the adversaries, and will pursue his enemies into darkness.

cnv.text: 但他必用氾濫的洪水， 盡行毀滅尼尼微之地， 把他的仇敵趕入黑暗之中。

ccb.text: 祂必用滔滔洪水灭绝祂的敌人， 把他们驱逐到黑暗中。
